top_priorities.title: Build Dashboard v1 shell from static JSON
top_priorities.reason: The dashboard spec already supports static config first, then live API data. This gives KOVA a visible command center before every connector is perfect.

top_priorities.title: Wire Google Calendar into Daily Digest v1
top_priorities.reason: Calendar access is readable and should be the first live digest source.

top_priorities.title: Create integration seed files for Contacts, Dropbox, Notion, Manus, and OpenAI Platform
top_priorities.reason: Unavailable or empty connectors still need declared targets, scopes, owners, and expected outputs.

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.evidence: Repo metadata readable and command-center files writable.
integrations.next_action: Use Kova-ai-SYSTEM as canonical command center and add implementation backlog files.

integrations.name: Google Calendar
integrations.evidence: Upcoming calendar events are readable through the connected calendar integration.
integrations.next_action: Turn calendar reads into the Today Card and Daily Digest agenda section.

integrations.name: Google Contacts
integrations.evidence: Contacts search ran, but broad VIP query returned no matching contacts.
integrations.next_action: Create a VIP/entity seed list: Katy, Reagan, Marcy, Blake, medical providers, school, vendors, collaborators.

integrations.name: Manus
integrations.evidence: No live Manus connector is available in this runtime.
integrations.next_action: Export Manus project docs/assets into Drive or GitHub and track links in integrations/manus_sources.md.

integrations.name: Dropbox
integrations.evidence: No Dropbox connector is available in this runtime.
integrations.next_action: Pick a canonical Dropbox folder and define file-index rules before connecting OAuth/API.

integrations.name: Notion
integrations.evidence: No Notion connector is available in this runtime.
integrations.next_action: Define the Notion database schema or choose GitHub docs as source of truth to avoid duplicate dashboards.

integrations.name: OpenAI Platform
integrations.evidence: Config template exists, but real secrets must not be committed.
integrations.next_action: Create an OpenAI project/API key and store it only in deployment/local secrets.

blockers: No live Manus connector in runtime.
OpenAI Platform needs private API key/project setup outside the repo.
Google Contacts needs a seed/entity list because broad contact search returned no matches.
Dashboard deployment target still needs a final repo decision: kovaos-site vs kova-ai-site.
next_actions: Create a static dashboard shell that reads config/dashboard.v1.json.
Create reports/digests/2026-07-08.md as the first manual/live hybrid digest artifact.
Create integrations/external_source_targets.md for Manus, Dropbox, Notion, and OpenAI Platform setup instructions.
Choose the dashboard implementation repo and wire it to this command-center config.
